publishedfiledetails.title: KI5's temp B42.13+ MP collection
publishedfiledetails.description:
This is a temporal collection of stuff that was updated for b42.13 MP so far, the main collections still work fine and any mod that gets updated to b42 will just pop up in your mod list anyway, but this is just to have an overview of what is fully supported for b42 mp for now.

✅ B42 (b42.13/14/15/16/17/18) Single Player / Multiplayer fully supported

shoutout to SeusSlaw for the idea
